title: Anti-cheat & Security Overhaul
excerpt: Complete overhaul of anti-cheat validation, enhanced security, new validation schemas, chat API, and backend cleanup.

items.description: Complete overhaul of the server-side anti-cheat system (advanced validation, anomaly detection, adjusted tolerances).
Added Zod schemas for strict validation of game state and requests.
Stronger checks on ratios, timestamps, max values, and progression logic.
Data integrity verification and corruption detection.
New chat API with OpenAI moderation and spam limitation.
Secured endpoints (allowed origins, rate limiting, request validation).
Migration and cleanup of SQL scripts for consistent profiles and saves.
Removed obsolete SQL files and endpoints.
Re-enabled and secured automatic game state autosave every 5-10 seconds, with logic to avoid conflicts during purchases.
Stability improvements for autosave and game state management.
Added real-time chat panel to the interface.
Improved error messages and user feedback for security actions.
General refactoring for better maintainability and code readability.
Cleanup of scripts and removal of dead code.
